title: First Unique Character in a String
description:
Given a string `s`, find the **first non-repeating character** and return its
index. If it does not exist, return `-1`.
constraints: s consists of only lowercase English letters.

solutions.summary: Tally each character, then return the first index whose count is one.

steps.title: Count every character
steps.explanation: Build a map from each character to how many times it appears.

steps.title: Return the first count-of-one index
steps.explanation: Walk the string again; the first character with a count of `1` is the answer.
